ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., dice, card, etc.) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "game_category" TEXT /* Category of the game (e.g., casino, sports, esports) */,
  "game_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the client */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Current account balance of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being bet on */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client offering the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "bet_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet (e.g., win, lose, push) */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., payout amount) */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, won, lost) */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., single, accumulator, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, bet) */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_instances" (
  "game_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game instance */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client offering the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "game_start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the game instance */,
  "game_end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the game instance */,
  "game_instance_status" TEXT /* Status of the game instance (e.g., active, completed, abandoned) */,
  "game_instance_type" TEXT /* Type of game instance (e.g., tournament, cash game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_instances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_instances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_instances_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "game_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game instance */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, lose, push) */,
  "game_outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the game outcome (e.g., pending, confirmed, disputed) */,
  "game_outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of game outcome (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_game_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_instance_id") REFERENCES game_instances ("game_instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_outcomes" (
  "bet_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet outcome */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., payout amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_outcomes_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_configs" (
  "game_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game configuration */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Configuration key */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Configuration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_configs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_configs" (
  "client_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client configuration */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Configuration key */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Configuration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_configs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_configs" (
  "user_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Configuration key */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Configuration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_configs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_history" (
  "game_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the game instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_history" (
  "bet_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_history_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameinstancehashes" (
  "hash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hash entry */,
  "game_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game instance */,
  "hash_value" TEXT /* Hash value of the game instance */,
  "nonce" INTEGER /* Nonce value used to generate the hash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameinstancehashes_game_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_instance_id") REFERENCES game_instances ("game_instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "game_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_reviews" (
  "client_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "user_feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "game_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_updates" (
  "client_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client update */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_updates_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "system_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* Text of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_log_id")
)
